title: Prenatal Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prenatal Care 56 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Any pregnant person is eligible for OMC, regardless of their income or insurance status Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS BEAVERCREEK HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for adults and children such as general physicals, vaccinations, treatment of acute and chronic illness, prenatal care, substance use assessment, and health education. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurances on the Federal Health Exchange. 110 Beavercreek Road Suite 100 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS SANDY HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for adults and children such as general physicals, vaccinations, treatment of acute and chronic illness, prenatal care, substance use assessment, and health education. Services include prenatal care, well child checks, immunizations, and general medical care for all ages. Visiting health care providers also provide specialty care services. 559 W Washington Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm (541) 573-2074 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LA CLINICA HEALTH LA CLINICA WEST MEDFORD HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Services include well baby and child check-ups, annual exams and physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, reproductive health services including contraception, and care for chronic conditions. Pharmacy is open to the community and offers patient discounts. 1307 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LA CLINICA HEALTH LA CLINICA WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Pharmacy is open to the community and offers patient discounts. 221 W Stewart Avenue Suite 101 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP POSTPARTUM DEPRESSION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides screenings and diagnostics for prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety. 76 NE 12th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Clinic: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 8am-1pm (by appointment) Urgent care: Monday-Friday 2pm-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm Email (541) 475-3874 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of primary care services including care of men, women, and children. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurance plans on the Federal Health Exchange. 3653 SE 34th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 988-5558 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRENATAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal care offered through partnership with OHSU Hillsboro Medical Clinic. Patients who receive prenatal care at NHC will work with providers to make delivery arrangements at Hillsboro Medical Center. Prenatal care services include routine scheduled exams, lactation education and support, along with birth planning, postpartum, and well baby care. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES WEST SALEM CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. Provides urgent care clinic for current patients only. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC BARNES ROAD OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wide range of obstetric and gynecological care. Services include prenatal care, midwifery and delivery services, family planning and birth control options (including tubal ligations). Offers HPV vaccinations, menopausal and infertility treatments. 11750 SW Barnes Road Suite 300 Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 416-9922 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetric and gynecological services. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH THE DALLES CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preconception counseling and individualized prenatal care; able to co-care for some health issues and can take late transfers with previous prenatal care established. Team of midwives and students serve families in a free-standing birth center and at home births, including water births. Postpartum care offered at birthing center or at patient's home and continues for both mother and baby for up to 6 weeks. Postpartum care includes newborn exam/screening, hearing screening, weight-checks, any lab work needed for mother, and can end with a well-woman exam. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SANTIAM HOSPITAL AND CLINICS SANTIAM WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of women’s health care, including annual exams, female sterilization and family planning including prenatal care and delivery. 1373 N 10th Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 769-9522 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINIC CAVE JUNCTION HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary, patient-centered medical care for adults and children, as well as mental health evaluations, immunizations, pregnancy testing, prenatal services, and drug and alcohol assessments. Established patients can also access low cost prescriptions on-site.
